atDirectives.name: @tailwind
atDirectives.description: Inject Tailwind's base, components, utilities, or screens styles into the stylesheet.

atDirectives.name: @apply
atDirectives.description: Inline existing Tailwind utility classes into a custom CSS rule.

atDirectives.name: @layer
atDirectives.description: Place custom styles into Tailwind's base, components, or utilities layer.

atDirectives.name: @config
atDirectives.description: Load a specific Tailwind configuration file for the current stylesheet.

atDirectives.name: @screen
atDirectives.description: Generate styles at a configured Tailwind breakpoint.
